mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follows (follower_id, followee_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followeeId}) ON CONFLICT (follower_id, followee_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND followee_id = #{followeeId}
mapper.sql: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follows f2 WHERE f2.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND f2.followee_id = u.id) AS is_following
